shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch standing at a launcher with extension icons radiating outward, representing Raycast's ecosystem.
assets.caption: Hatch standing at a launcher with extension icons radiating outward, representing Raycast's ecosystem.
assets.prompt: Raycast's Developer-First Launcher | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing at a macOS launcher interface with dozens of colorful extension icons radiating outward from it — representing the extension ecosystem. Hatch looks proud, like it built the platform. Cream background, no speech bubbles. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400×1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch observing the limitations of plain search boxes and Applescript-based extensions.
assets.caption: Hatch observing the limitations of plain search boxes and Applescript-based extensions.
assets.prompt: Raycast's Developer-First Launcher | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose looking at two old-style launcher interfaces: one is a plain search box (Spotlight), the other has a script editor showing Applescript code (Alfred extensions). Hatch's expression suggests "there is a better way." Cream background. Aspect 1600×1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch examining a React-based Raycast extension with the rendered output next to the code.
assets.caption: Hatch examining a React-based Raycast extension with the rendered output next to the code.
assets.prompt: Raycast's Developer-First Launcher | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose looking at a code editor showing a React component — a simple Raycast extension implementation with familiar JSX syntax. Next to the code, a rendered Raycast List view shows the extension output. The connection between "familiar code" and "powerful tool" is the visual. Cream background. Aspect 1800×1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch presenting the Raycast extension store with over 1,000 community-built tools.
assets.caption: Hatch presenting the Raycast extension store with over 1,000 community-built tools.
assets.prompt: Raycast's Developer-First Launcher | evidence-card: Hatch pointing at a grid of extension icons — 12-16 small colored squares representing different tools (GitHub, Linear, Notion, etc.). A counter in the corner shows "1,000+". Clean, organized display. Cream background. Aspect 1600×1000. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch coaching on the relationship between a small core platform and a large extension ecosystem.
assets.caption: Hatch coaching on the relationship between a small core platform and a large extension ecosystem.
assets.prompt: Raycast's Developer-First Launcher | lesson-frame: Hatch in coaching pose with a visual showing a small core platform (the launcher) and a large ecosystem (hundreds of extensions) built around it. The proportion illustrates that the ecosystem dwarfs the core. Cream background. Aspect 1800×1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
